name: Chocolate Dream Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 package Dark Fudge Cake Mix (Duncan Hines)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
2. Prepare, bake, and cool the cake following package directions.
3. FOR CHOCOLATE HEARTS GARNISH:
a. Spread melted chocolate to 1/8 inch thickness on waxed paper-lined cookie sheet.
b. Cut shapes with heart cookie cutter when chocolate begins to set.
c. Refrigerate until firm. Push out heart shapes and set aside.
4. Split each cake layer in half horizontally.
5. Spread one third of whipped topping on the first layer.
6. Place the second layer on top of the filling.
7. Repeat with remaining layers.
8. Spread milk chocolate frosting on sides and top of the cake.
9. Sprinkle pistachios around edges.
10. Position chocolate hearts by pushing points down into the cake.
11. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
